features.title: Rust Workspace Scaffold
features.description: Root Cargo.toml workspace, all crate stubs, package.json monorepo

features.title: Tauri Desktop App Shell
features.description: Tauri v2 desktop app with React frontend, all command registrations, sidecar management

features.title: Local LLM Integration (llama-server sidecar)
features.description: hermes-llm crate + Tauri commands to start/stop llama-server, list models, stream completions

features.title: Voice Input (whisper-server sidecar)
features.description: hermes-voice crate + Tauri commands to transcribe audio via whisper-server process
features.notes: Supports real-time streaming via WebSocket + file transcription

features.title: Media Processing (FFmpeg sidecar)
features.description: hermes-media crate wraps FFmpeg subprocess for audio extraction, transcoding, info probe

features.title: Hermes API Bridge (nightshift sidecar)
features.description: Connect Tauri desktop to existing nightshift FastAPI services for agent runs, approvals, repos

features.title: Chat UI with Streaming
features.description: React chat panel with SSE streaming, tool call display, voice input button, file attach

features.title: Settings & White-label Config
features.description: Settings panel for API keys, model selection, branding overrides; backed by tauri-plugin-store

features.title: Enterprise Security Layer
features.description: API key encryption via system keyring, audit log, RBAC for multi-user deployments

features.title: One-click Installer & Auto-updater
features.description: Tauri bundle targets (MSI, dmg, AppImage), bundled sidecar binaries, auto-update via tauri-plugin-updater
features.notes: Requires code signing for macOS notarization

features.title: Postiz Social Publishing Integration
features.description: Agent can schedule/publish to social platforms via Postiz API

features.title: StoryToolkitAI Video Intelligence
features.description: Video analysis, transcription, intelligent clip selection via StoryToolkitAI integration

features.title: LightRAG Memory Subsystem
features.description: LightRAG-backed persistent memory for agent sessions; knowledge graph + vector retrieval

features.title: Tenant / White-label Layer
features.description: Multi-tenant isolation, domain routing, per-tenant branding, RBAC

features.title: Billing & Metering
features.description: API call counting, subscription model enforcement, Stripe integration
